title: E-Rikshaw / E-Cart Battery
description: The Arenq Series from Sunlit Power features advanced Lithium Iron Phosphate (LiFePO4) battery technology, engineered specifically for E-Carts and E-Autorickshaws. These batteries offer superior safety, longer cycle life, faster charging, and high thermal stability—making them an ideal choice for reliable and efficient electric mobility. The Arenq E-Autorickshaws and E-Cart series range also includes systems from 48V to 72V.
short_description: Advanced LiFePO4 batteries engineered for E-Carts and E-Autorickshaws offering superior safety and longer cycle life.

features: Impact-resistant & waterproof Casing - IP67 or higher recommended

title: E-Scooter Battery
description: The Arenq Series, developed by Sunlit Power Pvt. Ltd., features advanced Lithium Iron Phosphate (LiFePO4) battery technology, purpose-built for electric scooter (E-scooter) applications. Engineered for urban mobility, the Arenq Series combines high performance, long cycle life, and robust safety with key features like a compact and lightweight design, fast-charging capability, and an intelligent Battery Management System (BMS) for real-time monitoring and protection. The range includes systems from 48V to 72V.
short_description: Compact, lightweight, and fast-charging LiFePO4 batteries purpose-built for electric scooters.

features: Smart Bluetooth Connectivity For Battery Monitoring

title: Traction Battery (MHE)
description: The Arenq Series features cutting-edge Lithium Iron Phosphate (LiFePO4) battery technology, meticulously engineered for Material Handling Equipment (MHE) such as forklifts, pallet trucks, stackers, and reach trucks. Built to deliver high performance, long cycle life, and enhanced safety, it provides a smart and sustainable power solution for operations demanding reliability. The range includes systems from 24V to 80V.
short_description: Heavy-duty LiFePO4 traction batteries for forklifts, pallet trucks, and material handling equipment.

features: Consistent power delivery across charge levels

title: Stacker Battery
description: The Arenq Series features advanced Lithium Iron Phosphate (LiFePO4) battery technology, engineered specifically for Pallet Trucks. These batteries deliver superior safety, extended cycle life, fast charging capability, and high thermal stability—making them the ideal power solution for reliable, efficient, and long-lasting pallet truck operations. The range includes systems from 24V to 48V.
short_description: Highly durable and maintenance-free LiFePO4 batteries designed specifically for Pallet Trucks and Stackers.

title: Substation Batteries
description: Arenq offers advanced Lithium Iron Phosphate (LiFePO4) battery solutions specially engineered for power substations and switchgear backup systems. These batteries are designed to ensure uninterrupted DC power to protection relays, breakers, and automation systems—guaranteeing operational safety and grid reliability. Tested in NABL-accredited laboratories, they deliver trusted performance for substations across India. Range includes systems from 24V to 220V.
short_description: Advanced LiFePO4 backup battery solutions for power substations and grid automation systems.

features: High Safety – No fire or explosion risk due to stable chemistry
Wide Temperature Range Works from -20°C to +60°C
Long Life – 3000+ cycles, lasting over 10-15 years
Smart BMS – Built-in protections and remote monitoring
Fast Charging – Charges quicker than lead-acid and Ni-Cd
Deep Discharge Supports up to 100% Depth of Discharge
Compact & Lightweight Smaller footprint, easier handling

title: Crane Batteries
description: Arenq brings robust and reliable Lithium Iron Phosphate (LiFePO4) battery solutions specially engineered for electromagnetic crane operations. These cranes require powerful, instant, and safe DC backup to activate electromagnets used in lifting heavy ferrous loads—making Arenq the perfect battery partner for industrial crane systems. Ensuring full compliance with industry safety standards. Range includes systems from 110V to 220V.
short_description: Robust LiFePO4 battery solutions delivering high surge currents for electromagnetic industrial cranes.

features: High Surge Current Capability Supports the high initial current draw required for activating electromagnets
LiFePO4 Battery Chemistry Offers better safety, longevity, and stability compared to lead-acid batteries
Long Lifecycle Up to 2500–3000 charge/discharge cycles, reducing replacement frequency
Smart BMS with CAN/RS485 Enables real-time monitoring and protection during intense load cycles
Reliable in Extreme Conditions Performs effectively in dusty, high-heat and vibration prone environments
